title: IS NULL unexpectedly evaluates to TRUE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT, c REAL, PRIMARY KEY(a, b));
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
UPDATE t1 SET c = CAST('' AS DOUBLE PRECISION) WHERE a = 1;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE t1.c IS NULL;
SELECT t1.c IS NULL FROM t1 WHERE b = 'test';
key_bug_features: IS NULL condition incorrectly evaluates to TRUE
